Config.EnableMod.Label: Enable Mod
Config.EnableMod.Tooltip: Toggle the mod on or off.
Config.Hotkey.Label: Call Horse
Config.Hotkey.Tooltip: The hotkey used to summon your horse when the Horse Flute is in your Special Items tab.
HorseFlute.Name: Horse Flute
HorseFlute.Description: A curious flute that summons your horse. When purchased, it is permanently bound to your Special Items tab.
Log.ContentPatcherRequired: Content Patcher is required for this mod to work. Please install Content Patcher and try again.
Log.SummonFailed: Failed to summon horse. Make sure you have the Horse Flute in your Special Items tab and try again.
Log.ModDisabledRevert: Mod disabled successfully! Horse Flute returned to inventory and power removed.
